Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.operations

Class History

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.operations.History
All Implemented Interfaces:
IRodinHistory
public class History extends Object implements IRodinHistory

    Adds the specified listener to the list of operation history listeners that are notified about changes in the history or operations that are executed, undone, or redone.

    Returns the label of the operation that will next be redone in the given context.

    Returns the label of the operation that will next be undone in the given undo context.

    Returns whether there is a valid redoable operation available in the given context.

    Returns whether there is a valid undoable operation available in the given context.
    void

    Redoes the most recently undone operation in the given context.
    void
    setLimit(int limit)
     
    void
    undo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
    Undoes the most recently executed operation in the given context.

    • redo

      public void redo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Redoes the most recently undone operation in the given context.
      Specified by:
      redo in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be searched for the redo operation to be executed

    • undo

      public void undo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Undoes the most recently executed operation in the given context.
      Specified by:
      undo in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be searched for the undo operation to be executed

    • dispose

      public void dispose(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)

    • getNextUndoLabel

      public String getNextUndoLabel(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Returns the label of the operation that will next be undone in the given undo context.
      Specified by:
      getNextUndoLabel in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      context - the undo context
      Returns:
      the label of the operation that will next be undone in the given undo context or an empty string otherwise

    • setLimit

      public void setLimit(int limit)

    • isUndo

      public boolean isUndo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Returns whether there is a valid undoable operation available in the given context.
      Specified by:
      isUndo in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be checked
      Returns:
      true if there is an undoable operation, false otherwise.

    • isRedo

      public boolean isRedo(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Returns whether there is a valid redoable operation available in the given context.
      Specified by:
      isRedo in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be checked
      Returns:
      true if there is an redoable operation, false otherwise.

    • getNextRedoLabel

      public String getNextRedoLabel(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext context)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Returns the label of the operation that will next be redone in the given context.
      Specified by:
      getNextRedoLabel in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      context - the context to be redone
      Returns:
      the label of the operation that will next be redone in the given context or an empty string otherwise

    • addOperationHistoryListener

      public void addOperationHistoryListener(org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IOperationHistoryListener listener)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinHistory
      Adds the specified listener to the list of operation history listeners that are notified about changes in the history or operations that are executed, undone, or redone.
      Specified by:
      addOperationHistoryListener in interface IRodinHistory
      Parameters:
      listener - the IOperationHistoryListener to be added as a listener. Must not be null. If an attempt is made to register an instance which is already registered with this instance, this method has no effect.
      See Also:
      • IOperationHistoryListener
      • OperationHistoryEvent
